---
title: "Factor Graphs for SLAM"
---

## Factor Graphs for SLAM

Handwritten notes covering the derivations in this chapter.

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DcVjwJDOL34yuNAHR8pdOMCh0PDOdWwq/preview" width="100%" height="800" style="border: none;" allow="autoplay"></iframe>

[Open in Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DcVjwJDOL34yuNAHR8pdOMCh0PDOdWwq/view?usp=sharing){target="_blank"}
